response.original_title: The Real Heiress Reclaims Her Place
response.overview: Elena, the biological daughter of the wealthy Delaney family, was framed by her adopted sister Sarah in a car accident. Wrongfully accused of drunk driving, she was sentenced to ten years in prison. Nobody believed her. Famous sculptor Leo helped her take a new identity. Flora grew into a renowned sculptor. When she returned, Sarah accused her of being an ex-con and plagiarizing artworks. Flora fought back, exposing Sarah's lies. Sarah was the bastard daughter of Elena's dad. Sarah got punished. Flora cut ties with the cold family and started a new life with her lover Marc.
response.title: The Real Heiress Reclaims Her Place
